rationale: The stated field is statistical mechanics (2D critical lattice models / CFT), a distinct specific field from the reference's high-energy theoretical physics (GKZ/discriminant-locus, string-theory-flavored) setting, so field_match fails. The stated mechanism is the McKay correspondence / ADE Dynkin classification of finite SU(2) subgroups, whereas the reference mechanism is the coalescence of discriminant-locus branches of a GKZ hypergeometric system generating an enhanced A-type root system; both invoke root systems but by genuinely different specific machinery, so mechanism_match fails and the answer is not equivalent.
